title: These Days Like Glass
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: After their mother's death, three estranged siblings sorting her estate discover she spent forty years secretly building a detailed miniature replica of the house they grew up in, with each room frozen at a different decade and one hidden figure who does not belong to their family.
long_description: After their mother's death, three estranged siblings sorting her estate discover she spent forty years secretly building a detailed miniature replica of the house they grew up in, with each room frozen at a different decade and one hidden figure who does not belong to their family.
